lemon_market_new_listings.description: The car is in mint condition.

This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant body damage and rust. The interior is heavily worn and in need of repair. Mechanical components require major service and are not currently fully operational.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a reliable daily driver. The exterior shows typical signs of age, including some minor paint chips and a small scuff on the rear bumper. Inside, the cabin is well-maintained but exhibits some wear on the driver's seat and floor mats. Mechanically, the car is sound and drives fine, though it is due for a standard oil change and potentially new tires in the near future. It is a practical choice for anyone needing a dependable vehicle at a reasonable price.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been consistently maintained throughout its ownership. The exterior paint still holds a strong luster, though close inspection will reveal a few minor surface scratches and small stone chips on the hood. Inside, the cabin is clean and well-kept, showing only light wear on the driver's seat bolster. Mechanically, the car is solid, shifts smoothly, and has no known leaks or warning lights. It is a reliable, well-cared-for example that is ready for its next owner.

Get ready to hit the road in this dependable ride! This car is a solid, honest choice for anyone looking for reliable transportation at a great value. While it shows some character from its years of service and has some visible cosmetic wear, it remains a sturdy performer that's ready for many more miles. It's the perfect opportunity to own a quality vehicle that's functional, reliable, and priced just right!
This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior and interior show minor wear from normal use. All mechanical and electrical systems are functional.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning motorist. It exhibits a high standard of mechanical integrity and aesthetic preservation, having undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure continued reliability and performance. Featuring a refined interior and a polished exterior profile, this selection offers a sophisticated driving experience that aligns with our dealership's commitment to quality and professional excellence.

Hey there! Thanks for stopping by! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a fantastic car. It’s in really solid shape and has plenty of life left for its next owner. It runs smoothly, looks great, and has been well-loved and looked after. If you're looking for a dependable, stylish vehicle that’s ready to hit the road today, this is the one for you! Feel free to reach out with any questions—I'd love to see it go to a great home!

This driver-focused E46 M3 features the high-revving S54 straight-six, delivering linear power through individual throttle bodies. The 6-speed manual gearbox shifts with precision, and the rear subframe has been reinforced to ensure structural integrity under high lateral loads. Recent preventative maintenance includes a comprehensive VANOS service and rod bearing replacement. Equipped with a limited-slip differential and a tuned suspension setup, this chassis offers exceptional turn-in and mid-corner stability. The exterior presents well with minor patina reflecting its history as a performance machine, while the mechanical systems remain robust and responsive. A turn-key enthusiast build optimized for both canyon carving and daily engagement.
Used vehicle. Good condition. Regular maintenance performed. Clean title. Reliable daily driver. No mechanical issues.

This well-maintained vehicle offers a perfect balance of luxury and reliability for its next owner. The exterior is finished in a timeless metallic silver that still holds a deep shine, though close inspection reveals minor stone chips on the hood and a small, professionally touched-up scuff on the rear bumper consistent with careful daily use. Inside, the cabin remains a comfortable sanctuary with premium black leather upholstery that is free of rips or stains, showing only light softening on the driver’s side bolster. Every interior feature, including the dual-zone climate control, heated seats, and the high-fidelity sound system, operates perfectly. Mechanically, this car is in great shape; it has been serviced regularly with synthetic oil changes every 5,000 miles, and I have a complete folder of maintenance records to prove it. The engine runs smoothly without any leaks, and the transmission provides crisp, seamless shifts. Recent service includes a fresh set of brake pads and a cooling system flush. It currently sits on all-season tires with approximately 70% tread remaining, ensuring it is road-ready the moment you take the keys.

Presenting a meticulously maintained specimen that exemplifies automotive integrity. This vehicle has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure mechanical excellence and consistent performance. The exterior retains a distinguished luster, while the interior cabin offers a refined environment reflective of responsible ownership. A premier choice for the discerning driver seeking a balance of sophistication and proven reliability.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, which exemplifies consistent care and mechanical integrity. This offering provides a sophisticated driving experience, balancing robust performance with a refined interior aesthetic. A premier choice for the discerning driver seeking a dependable, high-caliber automobile that has been preserved to an exacting standard.

Recent preventative maintenance includes a subframe reinforcement and a comprehensive cooling system overhaul. This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between performance and everyday practicality. The exterior boasts a deep, lustrous finish that has been regularly waxed, showing only the minor, expected signs of careful road use, such as a few tiny stone chips on the front fascia. Inside, the cabin remains a sanctuary of comfort; the premium upholstery is free of tears or significant wear, and every feature—from the dual-zone climate control to the intuitive infotainment system—functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is in robust health, having undergone consistent synthetic oil changes and all scheduled manufacturer inspections. The engine pulls smoothly, the transmission shifts seamlessly, and the brakes provide firm, confident stopping power. Currently sitting on a set of high-quality tires with excellent tread depth remaining, this car is truly turn-key and ready for its next owner. It offers a premium, reliable driving experience that reflects a history of responsible ownership.
